Variables.Name: EmitterName
Variables.Description: The name of the emitter to use that the source location for particle.

Variables.Name: SelectionMethod
Variables.Description:
The method to use when selecting a spawn target particle from the emitter.
	 	Can be one of the following:
	 		ELESM_Random		Randomly select a particle from the source emitter.
	 		ELESM_Sequential	Step through each particle from the source emitter in order.

Variables.Name: InheritSourceVelocity
Variables.Description: If true, the spawned particle should inherit the velocity of the source particle.

Variables.Name: InheritSourceVelocityScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the source velocity by when inheriting it.

Variables.Name: bInheritSourceRotation
Variables.Description: If true, the spawned particle should inherit the rotation of the source particle.

Variables.Name: InheritSourceRotationScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the source rotation by when inheriting it.

Variables.Name: bApplySourceOrbitOffset
Variables.Description: If true, the spawned particle should uses the location with the orbit offset of the source particle.
